description: Recipient device cannot decrypt the Welcome on this convo (NoMatchingKeyPackage). Server records the request and pushes a welcomeReissueRequest event to the inviter, who is expected to re-stage a new commit with a fresh KP. The recipient is told to wait. Rate limit: max 3 per (convo, recipient) per hour.

convoId.description: Conversation the failed Welcome is for.

recipientDeviceDid.description: Recipient device that cannot decrypt. This may be a device-qualified DID (did#deviceId).

reason.description: Free-form reason for diagnostics (e.g., NoMatchingKeyPackage hex_ref=...).

welcomeRequested.description: True if request was recorded and inviter notified.

requestId.description: Server-generated request identifier for the reissue workflow.

inviterDevice.description: Device that will be asked to re-issue. May be empty if no admin exists.

errors.name: NoAdminToReissue
errors.description: No current admin/inviter exists to ask. Recipient should Surrender.

errors.name: RateLimited
errors.description: Exceeded 3 requests per (convo, recipient) per hour.
